scripts.gen-types: sops exec-file --output-type dotenv --no-fifo ../enter.pollinations.ai/secrets/staging.vars.json 'wrangler types --env-file {} --include-runtime=false --env-interface CloudflareBindings worker-bindings.d.ts --env staging'
scripts.push-secrets:staging: sops exec-file --no-fifo ../enter.pollinations.ai/secrets/staging.vars.json 'npx wrangler secret bulk {} --env staging'
scripts.push-secrets:production: sops exec-file --no-fifo ../enter.pollinations.ai/secrets/prod.vars.json 'npx wrangler secret bulk {} --env production'
